---
applyTo: "RookRun.UnitTest/**/*.cs,RookRun.Web.UnitTest/**/*.cs"
---

# Testing Guidance

- Add or update tests for behavior changes.
- Keep tests focused on public behavior and edge cases.
- Place Strava-related backend tests under Strava folder/namespace in `RookRun.UnitTest`.
- For UI changes, add or update tests in `RookRun.Web.UnitTest`.

See:

- `docs/ai/feature-workflow.md`
- `docs/ai/project-map.md`
